generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "measures hoist swing angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance CartPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "measures cart position along gantry rail"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance HoistPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "measures hoist height position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateData
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartPositionSensor, HoistPositionSensor
]

instance CraneStateDataInDB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "time-series crane state data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "containerization platform for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, DataValidationService, DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, CraneSimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "time-series database for storing crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, DataValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "visualization dashboard for crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Physical Crane Interface Python application for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino-based sensor interface for physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling software for crane design"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for system design"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models of gantry crane in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "generates optimal movement trajectories for crane control"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance DataValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "compares real-time measurements with simulations for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides NotifyOperatorAction
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "logs real-time crane data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "provides Grafana-based visualization of crane data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "simulates crane behavior for trajectory planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "optimal movement trajectories for control decisions"
]

instance NotifyOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "operator notification for validation breaches"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "simulation-based insights for trajectory planning"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Grafana-based visualization of crane data"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "real-time data logging to TimescaleDB"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "cart movement control via TMC4671-Eval stepper motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "hoist movement control via TMC4671-Eval stepper motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "container handling via electromagnet"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartPositionSensor, HoistPositionSensor, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, Docker, TimescaleDB, Grafana, EclipseMosquitto, Python, Arduino, AutodeskFusion360, Capella, TrajectoryGenerationService, DataValidationService, DataLoggingService, VisualizationService, CraneSimulationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., movement trajectories) generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and executed via the Control Application through the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization between physical and virtual components for validation and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized system with physical crane connected to digital services via MQTT broker and TimescaleDB, deployed on a single personal computer using Docker for database, dashboard, and MQTT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models) and 'as operated' (real-time monitoring and validation) lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation using quantitative metrics between real-time measurements and simulation outputs, with threshold-based breach detection for system health monitoring."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for internal DT service communication; hardware interface details not specified in document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a single personal computer with Docker containerization for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, and Grafana services."
]
